title: Figure 1 in The complete mitochondrial genome of Dermacentor (Indocentor) auratus (Acari, Ixodidae)
author: Chavatte, Jean-Marc
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: Figure 1. Map of the mitochondrial genome of Dermacentor (Indocentor) auratus. Protein coding genes in purple; ribosomal RNA genes in dark blue; transfer RNA genes in light blue; control regions in red, and tick-boxes in green.
steps_raw: Figure 1. Map of the mitochondrial genome of Dermacentor (Indocentor) auratus. Protein coding genes in purple; ribosomal RNA genes in dark blue; transfer RNA genes in light blue; control regions in red, and tick-boxes in green.
